_metadata.description: Complete CZO mapping for Aviva across V132 (legacy), V134 (BAU), V148 (Guidewire)

versionRoles.V148: Guidewire (new service) - inherits from V134 with select overrides

provinceSpecific.BC: Uses EQ1T/EQ1A/EQ2T/EQ2A/EQ3T/EQ3A/EQ4A/EQ4T/EQ5A/EQ5T codes with 5%/8%/10%/15%/20% deductibles, building/contents/total options via OptionCd

isDiscountPatterns: csio:DIS* (DISAB, DISCP, DISSV, DISMI, DISWS, DISEM, DISTE, DISHY, DISSS, DISNS, DISMA, DISEV, DISGD, DISTR, DISMM, DISEL, DISAD)

csio:Z* discount codes (ZINTD, ZT0, ZT2, ZT3, ZD1-ZD4, ZNE-ZNH, ZE1, ZCOMB, ZSTBL, ZNB0, ZNBD1-2, ZCFD3-8, ZSB05-15, ZEXP1-M, ZLOY1-3, ZLOYD, ZFOY3-5, ZFFY3-5, ZFON0-2, ZFFN0-2, ZFMY2-5, ZSAFE, ZPKDI, ZCLSD, ZSHC2, ZCPID, ZEA, ZEE, ZPV, ZAEBS, ZASFO, ZASFI, ZARTD, ZRTDS, ZVMDS, ZFOND, ZRDNW, ZCWAD, ZBKUP, ZASMP, ZSBDD, ZHEDR, ZML05, ZML10, ZNH03-20, ZYR01)
isSurchargePatterns: csio:Z* surcharge codes (ZT1, ZT4, ZS1-S3, ZRSDS, ZRHDS, ZBAP1, ZANT, ZCS30, ZCS45, ZCS60, ZMFS1-3, ZSBSC, ZVACP, ZSTAS)

undeclaredCodes.description: Uninsured Automobile Occasional Driver - hardcoded inline, not in CompanyConstants
